cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the passage again carefully to understand the author's experience with learning English. The author says, "Though I focused on English for over two years, an English expert or a native speaker can easily find out my problems--the lack of professional learning..." This suggests that the author hasn't had professional instruction, so maybe they're self-taught.
